name: Crew Quarters
description: A 16-bedroom oceanfront event home in the gated Pine Island Club of Corolla, themed around a high-end Life Saving Station. Every bedroom is a private-bath suite, served by an elevator. The private fenced backyard has a pool, hot tub, cabana bar and outdoor fireplace; inside there's a great room, gourmet kitchen, theater, arcade and the 'Bar-ge' full bar. Purpose-built for weddings — a guest review describes a beach ceremony in front of the house with the reception in the backyard/pool area, plus a rehearsal dinner and post-wedding brunch at the home over the week.

price.note: All-in for Oct 4-11, 2026 (Sun-Sun week covering the Oct 10 target): $16,870 rent + $175 admin + $2,152 tax = $19,197. Strongly seasonal — peak late-Aug, Aug 23-30 (covers Aug 29): $26,439 rent, $29,974 all-in. No additional event fee. Pulled 2026-06-07 from the site's booking-engine quote.

availability.notes: Checked 2026-06-07 via the site's availability calendar. Of the target Saturdays, Aug 29 (book Aug 23-30) and Oct 10 (book Oct 4-11) are open; Aug 22 and Oct 3 are booked. Rentals run Sunday-to-Sunday (Sunday turn day), so a Saturday wedding means booking the Sun-Sun week around it.

contact.name: Atlantic Realty of the Outer Banks

attributes.eventFee: None — events up to 80 with no additional fee
attributes.outsideVendors: Allowed — 11th Hour is a preferred partner, not required
attributes.outdoor: Private fenced backyard with pool, hot tub, cabana bar, outdoor fireplace
attributes.amenities: Elevator, great room, gourmet kitchen, theater, arcade, fitness room, full bar
attributes.beachWedding: Yes — guest review confirms beach ceremony out front + backyard/pool reception
